## Problem to solve

Describe the user need or workflow this request would improve.

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior, command-line interface, report output, or API you would like.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds or alternative approaches have you considered?

## Additional context

Include examples, mockups, or links that help explain the request. Do not include signing credentials, customer applications, or other sensitive material.
